title: Executive Order 11459—Designation of the Secretary of Transportation to Approve and Certificate Containers and Vehicles For Use in International Transport

flags.justification: A narrow, technical designation implementing established international customs conventions.
Authority is anchored to the specific procedures and technical conditions in the named treaty annexes.
A technical certification delegation, not a compliance regime against the general public.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing designation implementing permanent international conventions.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, technical implementation of an already-ratified international framework.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
Sub-delegation to nonprofit firms or associations is bounded, excluding the issuance of regulations, a reasonable limit standard for international customs-facilitation arrangements.
